metadata.project_name: 深度学习课件制作流程指引

e8f83238-5483-41f8-b2e4-a86bb8474dfe.title: Implement neuron model with 6 activation functions
e8f83238-5483-41f8-b2e4-a86bb8474dfe.description: 讲解单个神经元的数学模型(权重求和+偏置+激活函数),实现6种常用激活函数Sigmoid、Tanh、ReLU、Leaky ReLU、GELU、Swish，包含公式、导数、PyTorch代码示例和适用场景分析。

success_criteria.text: 前向传播输出维度正确(batch_size, features)
反向传播梯度计算与numpy手动验证一致
ReLU和GELU在Transformer中梯度流向正确
Sigmoid梯度在x=0处为0.25,数值验证通过
ReLU在x<0时梯度为0,x>0时梯度为1,测试通过
GELU在x=0处近似erf(0)=0,测试通过

e8f83238-5483-41f8-b2e4-a86bb8474dfe.notes:
Phase 1: Foundations - Neural Network Basics

[Research Notes] Use dtype=torch.double for gradient checking. GELU approximation: 0.5*x*(1+tanh(sqrt(2/pi)*(x+0.044715*x^3))). Stable softmax: subtract max before exp(). Sigmoid prone to vanishing gradient - use GELU/Swish for deep networks.

Implemented in phase1_basics/activations.py with tests in tests/test_activations.py. All 50 tests pass including gradient verification.

4258a342-056d-460e-9713-e90b446818b1.title: Implement forward and backward propagation
4258a342-056d-460e-9713-e90b446818b1.description: 实现多层感知机的前向传播(矩阵乘法+激活函数级联)和反向传播(链式法则求梯度),包含计算图可视化、手动梯度验证和PyTorch自动求导对比。

success_criteria.text: 3层MLP前向传播输出维度正确
反向传播梯度与numpy手动计算误差<1e-6
PyTorch autograd梯度验证通过
计算图可视化显示正确的依赖关系
手动梯度验证误差<1e-6

4258a342-056d-460e-9713-e90b446818b1.notes:
Phase 1: Foundations - Neural Network Basics

[Research Notes] Gradient check: use torch.autograd.gradcheck with eps=1e-6, atol=1e-4. Central difference: (f(x+eps)-f(x-eps))/(2*eps). Relative error threshold < 1e-5. Always use dtype=torch.double for numerical accuracy.

Forward pass output shape test passed: test_forward_output_shape in test_mlp.py

Backward pass gradient numerical check <1e-6: test_linear_weight_gradient_numerical, test_linear_bias_gradient_numerical passed

PyTorch autograd verification: test_linear_backward_pytorch, test_mlp_backward_pytorch passed with atol=1e-6

Computational graph visualization: TestComputationalGraph tests pass, shows correct layer ordering and gradient flow

Manual gradient verification: test_mlp_weight_gradient_numerical passes with error < 1e-6

Created phase1_basics/mlp.py with LinearLayer, ActivationLayer, MLP classes

Created tests/test_mlp.py with 31 tests including gradient verification and PyTorch comparison

9fb23832-b728-4243-aa2f-41c3bf0bbf55.title: Implement 5 common loss functions
9fb23832-b728-4243-aa2f-41c3bf0bbf55.description: 实现5种常用损失函数：MSE、CrossEntropy、Focal Loss、Label Smoothing、Triplet Loss。包含数学公式、PyTorch代码、梯度推导。

success_criteria.text: 所有5个损失函数单元测试通过
梯度数值验证误差<1e-6
在MNIST数据集训练1 epoch收敛
Triplet Loss在margin=0.5时,正负样本距离差>margin
所有损失函数在GPU上运行,测试通过

9fb23832-b728-4243-aa2f-41c3bf0bbf55.dependencies: 损失函数需要前向传播计算输出

72f63d5d-aa09-418e-8d6e-4bf0476251a6.title: Implement gradient descent variants comparison
72f63d5d-aa09-418e-8d6e-4bf0476251a6.description: 实现并对比5种梯度下降算法：SGD、Momentum、Nesterov、AdaGrad、RMSProp、Adam。包含理论推导、PyTorch实现、收敛速度对比实验。

success_criteria.text: 6种优化器在MNIST上训练,Adam收敛步数<50步
Momentum在ravine曲面收敛速度比SGD快5倍以上
AdaGrad学习率自适应调整,测试通过
Adam在10种不同数据集上收敛稳定,测试通过
Nesterov在ravine函数上比Momentum收敛快2倍

72f63d5d-aa09-418e-8d6e-4bf0476251a6.dependencies: 梯度下降优化器需要损失函数和反向传播基础
72f63d5d-aa09-418e-8d6e-4bf0476251a6.notes:
Phase 1: Foundations - Neural Network Basics

[Research Notes] SGD+momentum for CNNs, Adam/AdamW for NLP/Transformers, RMSprop for RNNs. Adam: lr=0.001, betas=(0.9,0.999). SGD: lr=0.01, momentum=0.9.

1850d5ac-b938-4ead-9350-07c6c82702b5.title: Implement weight initialization methods
1850d5ac-b938-4ead-9350-07c6c82702b5.description: 实现5种权重初始化方法：Xavier(Glorot)、He、Kaiming、LSUV、Zero初始化。包含每种方法的理论依据、适用范围、PyTorch代码和对比实验。

success_criteria.text: Xavier初始化后权重方差在输入输出维度比例范围内
He初始化在ReLU网络方差保持,测试通过
LSUV迭代次数<10次达到目标方差,测试通过

deliverables.text: init_comparison.py - 方差传播验证实验

1850d5ac-b938-4ead-9350-07c6c82702b5.dependencies: 权重初始化需要在梯度下降框架内理解
1850d5ac-b938-4ead-9350-07c6c82702b5.notes:
Phase 1: Foundations - Neural Network Basics

[Research Notes] Xavier for Sigmoid/Tanh: std=sqrt(2/(fan_in+fan_out)). He/Kaiming for ReLU: std=sqrt(2/fan_in). Zero init for weights causes symmetry problem - never use. Bias: small constant (0.01) or zeros.

8a9c3d66-8694-4a88-97fb-e84f824a6964.title: Implement CNN architecture from scratch
8a9c3d66-8694-4a88-97fb-e84f824a6964.description: 实现CNN核心组件：卷积层、池化层、全连接层。包含前向传播实现、感受野计算、参数数量统计、PyTorch模块封装。

success_criteria.text: 卷积层输出维度计算正确(batch,C_out,H_out,W_out)
3x3卷积感受野为3x3,5x5感受野为5x5,验证通过
ResNet18风格网络在CIFAR10准确率>70%

8a9c3d66-8694-4a88-97fb-e84f824a6964.dependencies: CNN需要理解权重初始化和基础网络结构
8a9c3d66-8694-4a88-97fb-e84f824a6964.notes:
Phase 2: Architecture - CNN

[Research Notes] Conv2d: (in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size). Receptive field calculation. MaxPool2d for downsampling. Use He initialization for Conv layers with ReLU. BatchNorm2d after Conv before activation.

2383c31b-d5db-4959-bda4-59c70403b1fd.title: Implement RNN LSTM GRU from scratch
2383c31b-d5db-4959-bda4-59c70403b1fd.description: 实现RNN、LSTM、GRU三种时序模型。包含前向传播、反向传播(through time)、门控机制原理、梯度裁剪、PyTorch nn.Module封装。

success_criteria.text: LSTM 4个门输出维度正确(hidden_size)
BPTT梯度计算与PyTorch autograd误差<1e-5
GRU参数数量比LSTM少23%,测试通过

2383c31b-d5db-4959-bda4-59c70403b1fd.notes:
Phase 2: Architecture - RNN/LSTM/GRU

[Research Notes] LSTM has cell state (c) and hidden state (h). GRU simpler (no cell state). BPTT for gradient computation. Use gradient clipping to prevent explosion. PyTorch: nn.LSTM, nn.GRU with batch_first=True.

55130997-4a33-422e-a3f2-6e669f19b246.title: Implement self-attention mechanism
55130997-4a33-422e-a3f2-6e669f19b246.description: 实现Self-Attention、Multi-Head Attention、Position Encoding。包含QKV计算、缩放点积注意力、PyTorch实现、TransformerEncoderLayer封装。

success_criteria.text: Multi-Head输出维度与输入一致(batch,seq,hidden)
4头注意力每个头独立,参数不共享,测试通过
Sinusoidal位置编码在seq=100内唯一可区分,测试通过

55130997-4a33-422e-a3f2-6e669f19b246.dependencies: Self-Attention需要基础网络结构理解
55130997-4a33-422e-a3f2-6e669f19b246.notes:
Phase 2: Architecture - Self-Attention

[Research Notes] Multi-head attention: Q,K,V linear transforms, reshape to (batch, heads, seq, d_k). Scaled dot-product: softmax(QK^T/sqrt(d_k))*V. Use mask for causal attention (decoder). Einsum or matmul both work.

9570a925-ab3e-4575-9ec8-38f2490064a1.title: Implement normalization techniques comparison
9570a925-ab3e-4575-9ec8-38f2490064a1.description: 实现BatchNorm、LayerNorm、InstanceNorm、GroupNorm四种归一化方法。包含前向传播、均值方差计算、训练推理行为差异、PyTorch代码。

success_criteria.text: BatchNorm训练时统计量与输入一致,推理时使用moving average
LayerNorm在hidden dimension上求均值方差,测试通过
GroupNorm在group=4,C=32时输出正确,测试通过

9570a925-ab3e-4575-9ec8-38f2490064a1.dependencies: 归一化技术需要在CNN架构中应用
9570a925-ab3e-4575-9ec8-38f2490064a1.notes:
Phase 3: Training Techniques - Normalization

[Research Notes] BatchNorm: batch-dependent, for CNNs with large batches. LayerNorm: batch-independent, for Transformers/NLP. GroupNorm: batch-independent, for small batches (works with batch_size=1). InstanceNorm: for style transfer. SyncBatchNorm for multi-GPU.

98c84ab1-3da6-490a-bd95-174a2a8e064f.title: Implement dropout and regularization
98c84ab1-3da6-490a-bd95-174a2a8e064f.description: 实现Dropout、Variational Dropout、MC Dropout、Alpha Dropout。包含伯努利采样、权重缩放、训练推理行为、PyTorch实现。

success_criteria.text: 标准Dropout训练时激活值除以(1-p),推理时不使用dropout
MC Dropout在推理时采样10次,方差减少50%以上
L2正则化权重衰减在SGD中实现,测试通过

98c84ab1-3da6-490a-bd95-174a2a8e064f.dependencies: Dropout正则化需要理解归一化技术

8ec5f2d7-021f-4c93-bbe0-a8473550042c.title: Implement learning rate schedulers
8ec5f2d7-021f-4c93-bbe0-a8473550042c.description: 实现5种学习率调度策略：StepLR、CosineAnnealing、Warmup、CyclicLR、OneCycleLR。包含PyTorch实现、曲线可视化、收敛效果对比。

success_criteria.text: StepLR在step_size=30,gamma=0.1时,第30步学习率降为0.1倍
CosineAnnealing在T_max=100时,第100步学习率接近0
OneCycleLR在max_lr=0.01时,最大学习率为0.01,测试通过

8ec5f2d7-021f-4c93-bbe0-a8473550042c.dependencies: 学习率调度需要正则化基础

c65e901e-3b56-4565-895e-7325c14d0e4a.title: Fix gradient vanishing and explosion
c65e901e-3b56-4565-895e-7325c14d0e4a.description: 讲解梯度消失和梯度爆炸的成因、检测方法、解决方案。包含梯度裁剪、残差连接、门控机制、初始化策略。实验验证10层网络训练稳定性。

success_criteria.text: 梯度裁剪norm_type=2, max_norm=1.0时,梯度范数<=1.0
ResNet 10层残差网络在100层深时梯度范数>0.1
LSTM 10层网络梯度范数>0.01,无梯度消失

deliverables.text: gradient_stability.py - 梯度诊断与解决方案

c65e901e-3b56-4565-895e-7325c14d0e4a.dependencies: 梯度问题修复需要学习率调度基础
c65e901e-3b56-4565-895e-7325c14d0e4a.notes:
Phase 3: Training Techniques - Gradient Stability

[Research Notes] Vanishing gradient solutions: BatchNorm, ReLU/GELU (avoid Sigmoid/Tanh), residual connections, proper init (He for ReLU). Exploding gradient solutions: gradient clipping, lower LR, robust optimizers (Adam).

ef934c6c-a387-45ef-b532-d9ad88494ae0.title: Implement mixed precision training
ef934c6c-a387-45ef-b532-d9ad88494ae0.description: 实现FP16/BF16/TF32混合精度训练。包含梯度缩放、loss scaling、动态精度切换、PyTorch Apex和Torch.amp使用。

success_criteria.text: FP16训练收敛精度与FP32一致,误差<0.1%
GradScaler在loss<1时自动放大梯度,测试通过
BF16在A100上训练速度比FP32快1.5倍以上

deliverables.text: mixed_precision.py - 混合精度训练实现
amp_benchmark.py - 速度精度对比实验

ef934c6c-a387-45ef-b532-d9ad88494ae0.dependencies: 混合精度训练需要梯度稳定性基础
ef934c6c-a387-45ef-b532-d9ad88494ae0.notes:
Phase 4: Advanced Training - Mixed Precision

[Research Notes] For 4GB VRAM: Use torch.cuda.amp with GradScaler. Initial scale 2^16 (65536). Dimension alignment: batch/hidden size multiples of 8 (or 16). Monitor NaN during early training. FP16/BF16 reduction can cause inf - disable with torch.backends.cuda.matmul.allow_fp16_reduced_precision_reduction=False if needed.

a6e62082-4050-4bf2-8203-d1b49624dec8.title: Implement data augmentation techniques
a6e62082-4050-4bf2-8203-d1b49624dec8.description: 实现图像和文本数据增强：RandomCrop、Flip、Rotation、ColorJitter、Mixup、CutMix、RandomErasing、Token masking。

success_criteria.text: CutMix在CIFAR10上top-1准确率提升2%以上
Mixup在imagenet100上训练loss下降更快,测试通过
Token masking在BERT预训练中应用,测试通过

a6e62082-4050-4bf2-8203-d1b49624dec8.dependencies: 数据增强需要训练基础

5d0ce7aa-1016-4628-b3be-e9d7b9ee3dae.title: Implement distributed data parallel training
5d0ce7aa-1016-4628-b3be-e9d7b9ee3dae.description: 实现DataParallel、DDP分布式数据并行训练。包含单机多卡、多机多卡配置、梯度同步、SyncBatchNorm、PyTorch Lightning封装。

success_criteria.text: DDP在4卡训练速度比DP快30%以上
梯度同步误差<1e-6,测试通过
多机训练通过nccl后端通信,测试通过

5d0ce7aa-1016-4628-b3be-e9d7b9ee3dae.dependencies: 分布式训练需要数据增强和训练基础
5d0ce7aa-1016-4628-b3be-e9d7b9ee3dae.notes:
Phase 5: Optimization - Distributed Training (DDP)

Phase 5: Optimization - Distributed Training (DDP)

Key bottleneck: DDP is fundamental for all optimization techniques - pruning, quantization, checkpoint, memory, gradient accumulation all require distributed training skills

96ebe8c9-8234-4141-9aab-ce09da3ab596.title: Implement model pruning techniques
96ebe8c9-8234-4141-9aab-ce09da3ab596.description: 实现结构化和非结构化剪枝。包含Magnitude Pruning、Gradient-based Pruning、Channel Pruning、层间剪枝率配置。

success_criteria.text: 非结构化剪枝50%参数后准确率下降<1%
结构化Channel Pruning后模型体积减少50%
剪枝后微调恢复精度到原始98%以上

96ebe8c9-8234-4141-9aab-ce09da3ab596.dependencies: 模型剪枝需要分布式训练基础
96ebe8c9-8234-4141-9aab-ce09da3ab596.notes:
Phase 5: Model Compression - Pruning

RATIONALE: CNN path leads to compression - compression techniques apply to any trained model, CNN demonstrates the full pipeline

a0656c52-6958-4c86-ab26-b87f36c8d7e9.title: Implement model quantization
a0656c52-6958-4c86-ab26-b87f36c8d7e9.description: 实现PTQ和QAT量化方法。包含动态量化、静态量化、量化感知训练、INT8/INT4量化、ONNX导出。

success_criteria.text: PTQ INT8量化后模型体积减少4倍
量化后推理速度提升2倍以上
QAT量化精度损失<0.5%
INT4量化模型体积减少8倍
动态量化不需要校准数据,测试通过

a0656c52-6958-4c86-ab26-b87f36c8d7e9.dependencies: 模型量化需要剪枝基础

67f0e6c6-fa16-4a5f-86be-8aa088f0d440.title: Export model to ONNX format
67f0e6c6-fa16-4a5f-86be-8aa088f0d440.description: 实现PyTorch模型导出到ONNX格式。包含动态轴支持、算子转换验证、ONNX Runtime推理、模型调试。

success_criteria.text: ResNet50导出ONNX后推理输出与PyTorch误差<1e-6
ONNX Runtime推理速度比PyTorch快1.5倍
动态seq_length导出正确,测试通过

4e32bf98-a1ea-4099-9803-9d43cfed80c0.title: Implement knowledge distillation
4e32bf98-a1ea-4099-9803-9d43cfed80c0.description: 实现知识蒸馏训练方法。包含温度缩放、特征蒸馏、中间层蒸馏、蒸馏损失函数(CE+KL散度)、教师学生网络配置、蒸馏温度搜索。

success_criteria.text: 蒸馏后小模型ResNet18达到大模型ResNet50 95%精度
特征蒸馏使用L2损失,测试通过
蒸馏模型推理速度比教师模型快2倍以上

4e32bf98-a1ea-4099-9803-9d43cfed80c0.dependencies: Knowledge distillation requires fine-tuned teacher models from transfer learning

51c17488-6174-42c3-98cd-ebdb4e934d27.title: Compare CNN vs Transformer vs RNN architectures
51c17488-6174-42c3-98cd-ebdb4e934d27.description: 对比CNN、Transformer、RNN三种架构在图像、文本、时序数据上的表现。包含参数数量、计算复杂度、适用场景、优缺点分析。

success_criteria.text: ImageNet分类任务:ViT需要更多数据才能超越ResNet
文本分类任务:Transformer比RNN收敛快3倍以上
长序列任务:Transformer O(n^2) vs LSTM O(n),序列>1000时RNN更高效

51c17488-6174-42c3-98cd-ebdb4e934d27.dependencies: Architecture comparison also requires understanding Attention/Transformer for complete comparison
51c17488-6174-42c3-98cd-ebdb4e934d27.notes:
Phase 5: Deployment - Architecture Comparison

RATIONALE: RNN/Attention paths end here - CNN path demonstrates full training pipeline; RNN/Attention concepts can apply same techniques

766912e2-cca8-455b-8e51-6e3013fb658c.title: Optimize model for edge deployment
766912e2-cca8-455b-8e51-6e3013fb658c.description: 实现边缘设备模型优化。包含TensorRT加速、NCNN移动端部署、量化INT8、算子融合、内存优化。

success_criteria.text: TensorRT FP16推理速度比PyTorch快3倍
NCNN在Android手机上推理延迟<20ms
模型内存占用<100MB,测试通过
TensorRT INT8量化精度损失<1%
NCNN在iOS Core ML推理延迟<30ms

766912e2-cca8-455b-8e51-6e3013fb658c.dependencies: 边缘部署需要架构对比理解不同模型特点

500cd8ab-2392-4979-a232-acb5c435337c.title: Build end-to-end image classification pipeline
500cd8ab-2392-4979-a232-acb5c435337c.description: 从零构建完整工业级图像分类pipeline。包含数据管道、ResNet50训练、DDP分布式训练、混合精度、模型导出、TensorRT推理、API服务部署。

success_criteria.text: CIFAR10分类准确率>90%
4卡DDP训练速度比单机快3倍
TensorRT推理延迟<10ms

500cd8ab-2392-4979-a232-acb5c435337c.dependencies: 端到端pipeline需要边缘部署知识

e64d745b-7397-460d-859c-17f680e72d5b.title: Implement hyperparameter tuning
e64d745b-7397-460d-859c-17f680e72d5b.description: 实现超参数搜索方法：Grid Search、Random Search、Bayesian Optimization、Hyperband。包含学习率、批量大小、网络深度、宽度搜索。

success_criteria.text: Bayesian优化在20次试验内找到最优解,优于Random Search
学习率范围[1e-5,1e-1],最优值在[1e-4,1e-2]
Hyperband比Grid Search快5倍达到相似精度

e64d745b-7397-460d-859c-17f680e72d5b.dependencies: 超参调优需要端到端pipeline经验

489eef58-920c-4a21-b543-24d53023c6c0.title: Implement gradient accumulation technique
489eef58-920c-4a21-b543-24d53023c6c0.description: 实现梯度累积技术解决大batch训练问题。包含梯度累加循环、动态批量大小调整、显存优化、PyTorch实现、对比实验。

success_criteria.text: 梯度累加4步后等效batch=128,与单步batch=128精度一致
显存占用减少50%以上,测试通过
支持动态调整累加步数,测试通过

489eef58-920c-4a21-b543-24d53023c6c0.dependencies: 梯度累积需要分布式训练基础
489eef58-920c-4a21-b543-24d53023c6c0.notes:
Phase 5: Optimization - Gradient Accumulation

[Research Notes] For 4GB VRAM: batch_size=1 with accumulation_steps=16-32. Normalize loss by accumulation_steps. Update optimizer only when (i+1) % accumulation_steps == 0.

7be5a818-7e9a-47b0-a247-208860d7cd91.title: Implement training debugging and monitoring
7be5a818-7e9a-47b0-a247-208860d7cd91.description: 实现训练过程调试和监控。包含梯度流可视化、激活值分布、权重更新监控、TensorBoard集成、 wandb集成。

success_criteria.text: 梯度直方图在TensorBoard正确显示
激活值NaN检测触发,测试通过
权重更新率(更新量/梯度范数)在0.1-1.0范围

7be5a818-7e9a-47b0-a247-208860d7cd91.dependencies: 训练调试需要梯度稳定性知识

4a205408-4d91-4d81-bac0-9c076bec42c4.title: Implement transfer learning with fine-tuning
4a205408-4d91-4d81-bac0-9c076bec42c4.description: 实现迁移学习微调技术。包含预训练模型加载、特征提取、微调策略(freeze/partial/unfreeze)、学习率调度、逐层学习率。

success_criteria.text: ImageNet预训练ResNet50在CIFAR10微调,冻结骨干训练准确率>85%
逐层学习率(lr=1e-4到1e-6)比固定学习率精度提升2%
微调后模型收敛步数<50步,测试通过

4a205408-4d91-4d81-bac0-9c076bec42c4.dependencies: 迁移学习需要CNN架构基础

5e4e3be5-f6bf-4b3b-8fce-dae440eb57b8.title: Debug NaN loss and training instability
5e4e3be5-f6bf-4b3b-8fce-dae440eb57b8.description: 诊断和修复训练过程中的NaN loss问题。包含梯度爆炸检测、learning rate tuning、numerical stability、loss scaling、early stopping策略。

success_criteria.text: 梯度范数>100时触发警告,测试通过
NaN检测触发后自动降低学习率,训练恢复
数值稳定性测试在所有数据类型上通过

5e4e3be5-f6bf-4b3b-8fce-dae440eb57b8.dependencies: NaN调试需要梯度稳定性知识
5e4e3be5-f6bf-4b3b-8fce-dae440eb57b8.notes:
Phase 4: Advanced Training - NaN Debugging

[Research Notes] NaN causes: LR too high, improper init, data anomalies. Solutions: Reduce LR 5-10x, gradient clipping (max_norm=1.0), enable anomaly detection: torch.autograd.set_detect_anomaly(True). Check data: np.isnan().any(), np.isinf().any().

903e7750-5c5d-4a3f-a8cc-d33375145ce6.title: Implement checkpoint save and resume
903e7750-5c5d-4a3f-a8cc-d33375145ce6.description: 实现训练检查点保存和恢复。包含optimizer state保存、gradient state、mixed precision state、best model保存、resume from checkpoint。

success_criteria.text: 所有checkpoint单元测试通过
梯度验证误差小于1e-6
在MNIST数据集上训练恢复后收敛一致

39e2b18e-f07a-4ce2-9f26-07d2d4f4bc47.title: Implement memory optimization techniques
39e2b18e-f07a-4ce2-9f26-07d2d4f4bc47.description: 实现显存优化技术。包含gradient checkpointing、activation recomputation、in-place operations、memory efficient attention、CPU offloading。

success_criteria.text: Gradient checkpointing在10层网络节省50%显存
Activation recomputation计算开销<20%
CPU offloading在4GB GPU上训练12层Transformer

39e2b18e-f07a-4ce2-9f26-07d2d4f4bc47.dependencies: 显存优化需要分布式训练基础
39e2b18e-f07a-4ce2-9f26-07d2d4f4bc47.notes:
Phase 5: Optimization - Memory Optimization

[Research Notes] Gradient checkpointing: 4-10x memory reduction, ~20% slower. Use torch.utils.checkpoint.checkpoint() for transformer layers. Batch size=1 with high accumulation (16-32 steps) for 4GB VRAM.

2fe374ca-ef1b-41df-a406-c2271521c1a2.title: Implement early stopping callback
2fe374ca-ef1b-41df-a406-c2271521c1a2.description: 实现PyTorch早停回调函数。包含patience计数器、best model保存、restore best weights功能。使用torch.nn.Module实现。

success_criteria.text: 所有pytest单元测试运行通过
patience=5时触发早停机制
验证loss最低时保存权重

2fe374ca-ef1b-41df-a406-c2271521c1a2.dependencies: Early stopping需要训练监控基础
